messages.body: Hi Meera, hope you are eating well. This boy is from a good family. Please look at the photo.

messages.snippet: Meera, how are you? Are you getting enough sleep?
messages.body: Your mother is worried. Take care of your health first. Residency is hard but don't skip meals.

messages.subject: Congratulations on completing 1 year
messages.snippet: Meera, tomorrow is May 1st. One year of residency done.
messages.body: We are proud of you. Take care and eat well. Call us when free.

messages.subject: Call me!
messages.snippet: Meera, I tried calling you. Please call back.
messages.body: I want to talk about your summer plans.
